series_metadata.series_title: Copies of Purchase Requisitions, Orders, and Billing Records for Data Processing Services
series_metadata.series_description: Copies of records created to initiate the purchasing process, authorize and provide funds for, or satisfy claims and expedite payments for private service providers including copies of purchase orders, invoice requests, receipts, agency vouchers, service reports, and other supporting documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is issued and released, and all discrepencies are resolved. ; Electronic: audited by Auditor of State and audit report is issued and released, and all discrepencies are resolved
